title: Refactor podman to use c/common/pkg/report
body:
All formatting for containers stack moved into one package
This does not correct issue with headers when using custom tables

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [jwhonce] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
lgtm, does the refactor hit all the cases is podman and/or are there implementations outside of podman for MatchesJson...?

Changes LGTM
but all kinds of red tests.  I'm seeing that in a lot of Podman PR's today, I'm not sure if there's a generic test issue or not.
